text.title: GraphRAG — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `graph-rag` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: legal-document GraphRAG
section.p: Corpus: 12000 commercial contracts. Entity types: Party, Clause, Obligation, Jurisdiction. Multi-hop questions: 35%.

list.item: Schema: 4 entity types + 8 relation types committed (entity-schema.py).
Extraction: 12000 docs → 480k entities, 1.1M relations on gpt-4o-mini.
Graph build: Neo4j with constraints on (party_id, clause_id); merge duplicates by canonical-name.
Community detect: Leiden → 287 communities at L1, 38 super-communities at L2.
Summaries: per-community 200-token summary; per-super-community 500-token theme overview.
Query router: 'List all jurisdictions where Party X has obligations' → multi-hop → graph traversal + per-clause snippet.
